meta.authored_in: C-4 Session S8 (post-21 stynx adoption pilot, 2026-05-16)
meta.purpose: Map stynx-side invariants to the test suites that verify them. Required by devai inv-adherence-reverse to compute orphan plant surfaces (code that no invariant covers).
meta.tests_pending: INV-RBAC-001 and INV-PRIVACY-001 don't yet have dedicated test coverage. The promotions in Phase B established the rules; verification tests are a future Inspector deliverable. Until then, both invariants' `tests` arrays are empty — adherence-reverse will treat them as effectively non-verified.
